title: HornDawg
description: a Simple mod that adds cool Enchants to Goat Horns
body:
## HORN DAWG
### its a simple little mod that adds 4 enchants to the Goat Horns
- Avasting  "while falling use it to have a chicken spawn on you and take you down to safety"
- Typhoon   "spawns are wind disc around you to knock mobs back"
- Shriek    "shoots a warden shriek out of the horn"
- Elevation "shoots people up into the air apon usage"
